data.title: Implement hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh: shared _dso_register_hook_err_handler and _dso_hook_err_handler
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Create plugins/dso/hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh implementing the shared ERR handler library (Proposal 2: registration function).

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| CREATE | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh |

## Implementation
- Implement _dso_register_hook_err_handler() that atomically sets _DSO_HOOK_NAME and registers trap _dso_hook_err_handler ERR
- Implement _dso_hook_err_handler() that:
  - Disables ERR trap inside body to prevent recursion
  - Uses builtins only (no subshells for performance)
  - Lazily creates ~/.claude/logs/ directory
  - Guards log size (skip write if file >1MB)
  - Caches plugin version (read once, store in _DSO_HOOK_PLUGIN_VERSION)
  - Writes enriched JSONL to ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl with 7 fields:
    ts (epoch), hook (from _DSO_HOOK_NAME), line ($LINENO), repo_root (git rev-parse), plugin_version, bash_version, os (uname -s)
- New canonical log path: ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl (not the legacy path)
- Fail-open: handler returns 0 (never blocks hook execution)

## Depends On
- 6235-23e6 (RED test must exist before implementation)
